compiled_state.title: As a developer, I want CLAUDE.md and operational docs updated with kudos system operational notes and empty-snapshot behavior documentation
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
As a developer, I need CLAUDE.md and operational documentation updated with kudos system operational notes so that the kudos system behavior is operationally documented and contributors can reason about the system.

DONE DEFINITIONS:
- CLAUDE.md updated (task description explicitly names CLAUDE.md as target for rule 18 authorization): adds to Architecture section — scenario note: "kudos system T1/T2: empty snapshot disables triggers on clean worktrees — expected behavior; T4 does not require snapshot test data"
- CLAUDE.md update includes: kudos.snapshot_enabled config key documented; brief kudos system architecture note (ledger at .kudos/ledger.jsonl, snapshot at .kudos/test-gate-snapshot.json, gitignored)
- Task descriptions explicitly name CLAUDE.md, using-lockpick/SKILL.md, and any other safeguard files targeted

CONSIDERATIONS:
- [Safeguard] CLAUDE.md is a safeguard file (rule 18); task description must explicitly name CLAUDE.md
- [Sequence] H2 depends on N (which transitively covers all trigger stories) and O (sprint UNCERTAIN handling) — document actual behavior only after all stories land
